requests.prompt: App Store screenshot for a wellness alarm app. iPhone 6.5 inch (1290x2796) vertical. Background cream (#FAF7F2). Center: stylized phone screen mockup showing a single small lock icon in muted orange. Above the phone, large bold sans-serif headline: 'No accounts.' Below the phone, smaller text: 'No ads. No tracking.' Bottom corner: 'Morning Ritual' wordmark. Aesthetic: clean, calm, premium wellness, minimal — the trust message is the hero. The simplicity of the visual reinforces the privacy-first message. Soft, honest tone.
